northStar: Reproduce light at the air–water interface: Fresnel, Snell, TIR trap/escape, caustics — simulation not faked shading.
rootCauseFixed: LIVE never blends mismatched wave/cube frames; STILL freezes waves+cube and progressive-averages 1/N.

results.label: LIVE underwater path-trace (noisy, no ghost blend)
results.expect: Realtime path-trace; checkerboard cube visible; waves move; no temporal ghosting
results.stats: LIVE path-trace · 2 spp · 1400×900 · ocean · uncheck Animate for clean accum

results.label: STILL underwater — cube + surface (Snell / TIR / caustics)
results.expect: Checkerboard cube framed; surface above with Snell window / TIR dark band; caustic patches from wave topology

results.label: STILL refraction chapter — spectral caustics
results.expect: Dispersion + wave focus caustics on cube; progressive clean-up

results.label: STILL above water looking into volume
results.expect: Submerged checkerboard cube through interface; Fresnel + refraction

results.label: STILL Goethe colourless water (neutral medium)
results.expect: Cube through colourless medium; no bulk blue pigment

results.label: STILL diver view — depth + absorption
results.expect: Underwater cube; beer absorption; still path-trace

results.label: STILL look up — pure Snell window / TIR trap
results.expect: Looking upward: bright Snell cone of sky; dark TIR outside; ocean light trap visualization
